organization.name: HN Safal
organization.raw_address: HN Safal corporate house, Besides Circle P, Prahladnagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, IN
organization.short_description:
HN Safal, part of the HN Safal Group, is a leading real estate development company located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Established about a decade ago, it has built a strong reputation in the region, recognized as one of the top 10 real estate developers. The company focuses on both residential and commercial properties, with a significant portfolio that includes 100 projects—78 completed, 11 ongoing, and 11 upcoming—totaling 42 million square feet delivered and 9 million square feet under development.

HN Safal offers a range of services in architecture, commercial real estate, construction, and real estate investment. Its residential projects feature various apartment options, while its commercial developments include notable properties like Titanium World Tower and Mondeal One. The company emphasizes innovative design in its projects, as seen in its corporate office interiors, which showcase unique architectural elements and functional spaces.

organization.name: Arvind SmartSpaces
keywords: lessors of residential buildings and dwellings
organization.raw_address: 24,Government Servant Society, C G Road, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380009, IN
organization.short_description:
Arvind SmartSpaces Limited is the real estate division of the Kasturbhai Lalbhai Group, established in 2009 and based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. The company focuses on developing high-quality residential, commercial, industrial, and hospitality projects. It operates in cities such as Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Pune, and Vadodara, with plans for expansion into Mumbai.

The company has completed 7 projects in its first 8 years, delivering a total of 4.9 million square feet. It currently has 26.9 million square feet in ongoing projects and 43.5 million square feet planned. Arvind SmartSpaces offers a range of residential options, including luxury apartments, gated communities, and mid-income housing. Its commercial offerings include office spaces and retail developments. The company is committed to customer satisfaction and innovation, supported by a strong financial position and a dedicated team of 245 employees.

organization.name: Shivalik Group
organization.raw_address: Shivalik House, b/s Satellite police station, Ramdevnagar Cross Road,, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, IN
organization.short_description:
Shivalik Group is a leading real estate developer based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Founded in 1998 by Satish Shah and Chitrak Shah, the company has built a strong reputation for its residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. With over 50 landmark developments, Shivalik Group focuses on sustainable and human-centered design, ensuring that all projects are green-certified and incorporate energy-efficient technologies.

The company offers a range of services, including residential development of multi-unit apartment complexes, commercial spaces for offices and retail, and plotted developments for land-based residential projects. Shivalik Group also provides investment solutions through its Prelaunch Fund, allowing early access to premium real estate opportunities. Their commitment to architectural excellence, customer satisfaction, and environmental responsibility drives their mission to create spaces that enhance the quality of life for residents and communities.

organization.name: Goyal & Co.
organization.raw_address: 100 Feet Road, Prahladnagar Satellite, 10th Floor, Commerce House 4, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380015, IN
organization.short_description:
Goyal & Co., also known as Goyal & Co | Hariyana Group, is a leading real estate developer and construction company based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Founded in 1971, the company has significantly contributed to the urban landscape with over 200-250 completed projects, focusing on high-quality residential and commercial properties. It operates in major cities like Bangalore, Hyderabad, and Chennai, emphasizing innovation, transparency, and sustainable development.

The company specializes in real estate development and construction, offering a range of residential projects, including luxury apartments, villas, and integrated townships. It also develops modern commercial spaces. Goyal & Co. is known for its customer-centric approach and collaborations with industry leaders and architects, creating notable projects like Orchid Bloomsberry in Bengaluru. With a commitment to ethical practices and community trust, Goyal & Co. continues to shape the real estate market in India.

organization.short_description: Iscon Group is an ISO 9001:2000 certified organization, are engaged in the property development, property management, relationship building and satisfying every customer's smallest of needs and developing exclusive commercial and residential projects across the major cities of India.
